data.title: Peter Schiff Rings Alarm After Foreign Investors Dump $6.5 Billion In US Equities In A Week, Quips 'Trump Thought Tariffs Would Bring Capital Into America'
data.description: The turmoil in U.S. equity markets has spooked foreign investors, leading to massive outflows over the past week, as tariff-related uncertainties continue to persist.

data.title: Trump's Energy Department Mulls Cutting Billions In Clean-Energy Funds, Threatening Exxon, Occidental Projects
data.description: The U.S. Energy Department (DoE) is reportedly contemplating substantial reductions, potentially halting nearly $10 billion in federal funding for clean-energy projects. This move could jeopardize high-profile collaborations with Exxon Mobil (NYSE: XOM) and Occidental Petroleum (NYSE: OXY).

data.title: Tesla Price Target Slashed To $275 By Barclays Amid Margin Woes, But Elon Musk's FSD Push Could Lift Sentiment
data.description: Barclays has revised its price target for Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) from $325 to $275, attributing the downgrade to weak fundamentals.

data.title: Top US Scientist Leaves Department Of Energy To Join Sichuan University Amid Rising China Tensions
data.description: Amid escalating US-China tensions, senior scientist Yi Shouliang, formerly with the US Department of Energy, has left the United States to assume a new academic role at Sichuan University in China.

data.title: Benzinga's 'Stock Whisper' Index: 5 Stocks Investors Secretly Monitor But Don't Talk About Yet
data.description: The Benzinga Stock Whisper Index highlights five stocks that saw higher than usual searches and a look at the potential catalysts surrounding the names.
